content.output: issues, and biases. Despite these issues, the evidence presented in this report points to a fundamental shift, suggesting that GenAI LLMs are indeed beginning to instigate changes comparable to those seen in past industrial revolutions ([HBR, 2023](https://hbr.org/2023/06/the-ai-hype-cycle-is-distracting-companies)).
